---
title: "Summer Flounder Test"
author: "Sarah Gaichas"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)

library(wham)
library(SPASAM.MSE)

main.dir = here::here()

```

# Make a summer flounder model

## WHAM from ASAP?

Use an old ASAP file from the rec_measures MSE to get started. This thing has 20 indices. What could go wrong?

Try reading the ASAP file into WHAM:

```{r, eval=FALSE}

mod.dir="sf-test"
write.dir <- here::here(sprintf("WHAMfits/%s/", mod.dir))
dir.create(write.dir)

sfasap <- wham::read_asap3_dat(here::here("assessments/F2021_2019_V1_MCMC.dat"))
inputsf <- wham::prepare_wham_input(sfasap)

mod <- fit_wham(inputsf, do.proj=FALSE,do.osa = TRUE,do.retro = TRUE,do.check = T,do.sdrep = TRUE)
saveRDS(mod,file=file.path(write.dir,paste0(mod.dir,".rds")))
plot_wham_output(mod, dir.main=file.path(write.dir),out.type="png")

```

That actually ran and produced output, gives the right trends

```{r}
knitr::include_graphics(here::here("WHAMfits/sf-test/plots_png/ref_points/FSPR_relative.png"))
```

Convergence? no

```{r}

mod <- readRDS(here::here("WHAMfits/sf-test/sf-test.rds"))
wham::check_convergence(mod)


```

We'll need to simplify this

What if the output SSB with noise is the biomass index input, or just use output NAA as input?

This is the output NAA 1982-2019

```{r}
sfNAA <- readRDS(here::here("WHAMfits/sf-test/res_tables/stock_1_region_1_NAA_table.RDS"))

sfNAA
```


## From original risk policy MSE code?

Or what if we started with John Wiedenmann's summer flounder setup? This code is local, don't have permission to post in a public repo

Successfully compiled and ran his code for summer flounder.

First build the operating model No changes made to the abc_opmodel.tpl or .dat files sent In terminal:

```         
Sarahs-Air:summer_flounder_for_Sarah sarahgaichas$ admb abc_opmodel

*** Parse: abc_opmodel.tpl
tpl2cpp abc_opmodel || tpl2rem abc_opmodel

*** Compile: abc_opmodel.cpp
c++ -c -std=c++17 -O3 -D_USE_MATH_DEFINES -DUSE_ADMB_CONTRIBS -I. -I"/usr/local/admb/include" -I"/usr/local/admb/include/contrib" -oabc_opmodel.obj abc_opmodel.cpp

*** Linking: abc_opmodel.obj 
c++ -std=c++17 -O3 -oabc_opmodel abc_opmodel.obj "/usr/local/admb/lib/libadmb-contrib-arm64-macos-clang.a"

Successfully built executable.
```

Also compile the estimation model in terminal:

```         
Sarahs-Air:summer_flounder_for_Sarah sarahgaichas$ admb em_cf_selex
*** Parse: em_cf_selex.tpl
tpl2cpp em_cf_selex || tpl2rem em_cf_selex

*** Compile: em_cf_selex.cpp
c++ -c -std=c++17 -O3 -D_USE_MATH_DEFINES -DUSE_ADMB_CONTRIBS -I. -I"/usr/local/admb/include" -I"/usr/local/admb/include/contrib" -oem_cf_selex.obj em_cf_selex.cpp

em_cf_selex.cpp:598:9: warning: assigning field to itself [-Wself-assign-field]
                                        FL = FL;
                                           ^
em_cf_selex.cpp:605:9: warning: assigning field to itself [-Wself-assign-field]
                                        FU = FU;
                                           ^
2 warnings generated.
*** Linking: em_cf_selex.obj 
c++ -std=c++17 -O3 -oem_cf_selex em_cf_selex.obj "/usr/local/admb/lib/libadmb-contrib-arm64-macos-clang.a"

Successfully built executable.
```

Run the om

```         
Sarahs-Air:summer_flounder_for_Sarah sarahgaichas$ ./abc_opmodel
rm: assessment_estimates.txt: No such file or directory
rm: terminal_estimates_sf.txt: No such file or directory
rm: obs_est_sf.txt: No such file or directory
rm: time_varying_params.txt: No such file or directory
mr= 1 sa interval = 2 data lag = 1 i= 1 Seed 13 cr = 2 remainder  = 0
mr= 1 sa interval = 2 data lag = 1 i= 2 Seed 14 cr = 2 remainder  = 0
mr= 1 sa interval = 2 data lag = 1 i= 3 Seed 16 cr = 2 remainder  = 0
mr= 1 sa interval = 2 data lag = 1 i= 4 Seed 19 cr = 2 remainder  = 0
mr= 1 sa interval = 2 data lag = 1 i= 5 Seed 23 cr = 2 remainder  = 0
mr= 1 sa interval = 2 data lag = 1 i= 6 Seed 28 cr = 2 remainder  = 0
mr= 1 sa interval = 2 data lag = 1 i= 7 Seed 34 cr = 2 remainder  = 0
mr= 1 sa interval = 2 data lag = 1 i= 8 Seed 41 cr = 2 remainder  = 0
mr= 1 sa interval = 2 data lag = 1 i= 9 Seed 49 cr = 2 remainder  = 0
mr= 1 sa interval = 2 data lag = 1 i= 10 Seed 58 cr = 2 remainder  = 0
mr= 1 sa interval = 2 data lag = 1 i= 11 Seed 68 cr = 2 remainder  = 0
mr= 1 sa interval = 2 data lag = 1 i= 12 Seed 79 cr = 2 remainder  = 0
mr= 1 sa interval = 2 data lag = 1 i= 13 Seed 91 cr = 2 remainder  = 0
mr= 1 sa interval = 2 data lag = 1 i= 14 Seed 104 cr = 2 remainder  = 0
mr= 1 sa interval = 2 data lag = 1 i= 15 Seed 118 cr = 2 remainder  = 0
mr= 1 sa interval = 2 data lag = 1 i= 16 Seed 133 cr = 2 remainder  = 0
mr= 1 sa interval = 2 data lag = 1 i= 17 Seed 149 cr = 2 remainder  = 0
mr= 1 sa interval = 2 data lag = 1 i= 18 Seed 166 cr = 2 remainder  = 0
mr= 1 sa interval = 2 data lag = 1 i= 19 Seed 184 cr = 2 remainder  = 0
mr= 1 sa interval = 2 data lag = 1 i= 20 Seed 203 cr = 2 remainder  = 0
Model finished!
```

Files produced: /Users/sarahgaichas/Documents/Work/MAFMCindicators/summer_flounder_for_Sarah/output_for_cyrus.txt /Users/sarahgaichas/Documents/Work/MAFMCindicators/summer_flounder_for_Sarah/performance_measures_sf.txt /Users/sarahgaichas/Documents/Work/MAFMCindicators/summer_flounder_for_Sarah/em_cf_selex.log /Users/sarahgaichas/Documents/Work/MAFMCindicators/summer_flounder_for_Sarah/junk.txt /Users/sarahgaichas/Documents/Work/MAFMCindicators/summer_flounder_for_Sarah/assessment_estimates.txt /Users/sarahgaichas/Documents/Work/MAFMCindicators/summer_flounder_for_Sarah/term_est.txt /Users/sarahgaichas/Documents/Work/MAFMCindicators/summer_flounder_for_Sarah/em_cf_selex.rep /Users/sarahgaichas/Documents/Work/MAFMCindicators/summer_flounder_for_Sarah/em_cf_selex.bar /Users/sarahgaichas/Documents/Work/MAFMCindicators/summer_flounder_for_Sarah/em_cf_selex.par /Users/sarahgaichas/Documents/Work/MAFMCindicators/summer_flounder_for_Sarah/fmin.log /Users/sarahgaichas/Documents/Work/MAFMCindicators/summer_flounder_for_Sarah/em_cf_selex.dat /Users/sarahgaichas/Documents/Work/MAFMCindicators/summer_flounder_for_Sarah/BRPs_sf.txt /Users/sarahgaichas/Documents/Work/MAFMCindicators/summer_flounder_for_Sarah/performance_measures_head_sf.txt

This is the dat file input that goes with the tpl file

```{r, eval=FALSE}
# number of model iterations
20
#random number seed
13
# number of data lag runs to do
1
# data lag values
1 2 3 4 
# number of SA intervals to explore
1
# SA intervals
2 3 5 7 5 7 10
# number of years to model
66
# year when fishing begins 
1
# first year of data collection 
1
# first year of an assessment (from 1982 to 2017)
36
# Number of control rules to explore
1
# Life history index
2
# number of age classes
1
# number of age classes
8
# steepness
0.9
# R0
53569.
#S0
120000.
#M
0.26 0.26 0.26 0.25 0.25 0.25 0.25 0.24
# spawn fraction
0.83
# NAA
81955	56043	25826	3204	1102	370	222	252
102427	61401	28486	7718	1098	408	149	178
46954	75541	25145	5436	1840	292	123	87
78263	34603	29969	4176	1091	420	77	52
81397	57712	13745	4815	811	242	109	31
53988	59653	21238	1979	862	167	58	33
12474	39674	22770	3300	374	186	42	22
36963	9098	13316	2417	427	58	35	11
44019	26825	3426	2009	442	92	15	12
47704	31915	10988	791	591	146	34	9
47264	34992	12775	2154	190	159	45	13
43928	33221	10976	1811	434	45	44	16
58403	31857	12529	2199	458	123	15	18
78348	42085	12141	2528	577	137	41	10
59520	59020	26897	3740	445	106	30	12
52374	44901	38815	9819	880	109	31	13
54518	39840	31214	18434	3497	321	45	19
44100	41416	27383	14465	6378	1247	132	27
60551	33485	28640	14065	6151	2824	605	79
64979	45942	22959	13869	5376	2444	1263	311
67860	49508	32263	12752	6661	2674	1306	855
50131	51834	35494	18696	6424	3439	1466	1221
71270	38248	36908	20554	9533	3374	1922	1540
40634	54397	27325	21199	10250	4882	1841	1947
48153	30983	38583	15435	10373	5171	2624	2107
52646	36801	22377	23528	8511	5865	3069	2870
62460	40214	26566	14106	13919	5188	3708	3810
73747	47752	29853	18451	8993	7920	3029	4616
51331	56339	35276	20465	11526	5006	4541	4663
31296	39164	41305	23746	12433	6189	2786	5429
35187	23863	28729	27637	14014	6294	3239	4678
36719	26860	17651	19665	16878	7311	3370	4560
42271	27983	19726	11882	11664	8365	3739	4393
29833	32228	20540	13304	7146	5982	4436	4623
35853	22759	23727	13886	7981	3672	3169	5123
42415	27346	16770	16119	8398	4096	1941	4742
# Fmax
0.948	1.396	1.535	1.568	1.678	1.602	1.983	1.631	1.205	1.37	1.694	1.348	1.341	1.488	1.197	0.782	0.811	0.605	0.712	0.483	0.436	0.424	0.446	0.465	0.345	0.275	0.314	0.336	0.372	0.431	0.401	0.452	0.418	0.416	0.417	0.334
# Ctot
21408	30425	30470	26264	24837	23577	24598	11231	9028	12914	15985	13347	15016	12482	14734	13867	17079	15138	20146	15695	16473	19224	20958	19293	17868	14773	12909	14307	15408	17487	16163	17483	15275	12498	11796	9611
#WAA
0.244	0.419	0.716	1.075	1.257	1.495	2.567	3.351
0.251	0.398	0.632	1.046	1.5	2.163	3.456	3.886
0.29	0.429	0.613	1.109	1.726	2.297	2.671	4.721
0.256	0.454	0.668	1.16	1.739	1.994	3.31	3.382
0.263	0.446	0.651	1.14	1.941	2.862	3.378	3.344
0.319	0.462	0.624	1.13	1.738	2.486	3.888	3.762
0.135	0.456	0.689	1.04	1.474	2.248	2.408	2.709
0.214	0.421	0.811	1.162	1.538	2.143	3.024	4.305
0.166	0.441	0.701	1.186	1.812	2.519	2.975	3.66
0.183	0.417	0.718	1.226	1.392	2.687	2.302	4.456
0.208	0.482	0.689	1.478	1.671	1.865	2.816	4.49
0.31	0.489	0.598	1.349	2.092	2.763	3.399	3.703
0.228	0.532	0.675	1.058	1.643	2.645	3.624	4.094
0.265	0.496	0.559	1.076	1.629	2.341	2.727	4.914
0.204	0.448	0.633	0.862	1.244	2.257	2.609	3.429
0.221	0.522	0.643	0.842	1.324	2.444	2.745	3.815
0.156	0.34	0.583	0.876	1.423	1.944	2.736	3.471
0.094	0.567	0.784	1.079	1.783	2.702	2.645	3.025
0.135	0.536	0.766	0.97	1.454	2.171	2.611	3.736
0.192	0.438	0.723	0.956	1.382	2.107	2.734	3.744
0.171	0.473	0.739	1.026	1.526	2.072	2.794	3.357
0.307	0.49	0.72	0.969	1.361	1.788	2.409	3.183
0.208	0.425	0.674	0.922	1.187	1.512	1.897	2.452
0.156	0.453	0.665	0.964	1.271	1.661	2.24	3.138
0.167	0.387	0.681	0.941	1.279	1.734	2.22	2.831
0.18	0.372	0.592	0.87	1.162	1.559	1.92	2.507
0.167	0.348	0.583	0.837	1.084	1.497	1.943	2.703
0.169	0.316	0.503	0.758	1.047	1.398	1.899	2.734
0.182	0.327	0.495	0.676	0.998	1.501	1.864	2.457
0.202	0.335	0.568	0.742	1.022	1.473	1.845	2.328
0.180	0.340	0.548	0.777	1.063	1.486	1.894	2.546
0.180	0.340	0.548	0.777	1.063	1.486	1.894	2.546
0.180	0.340	0.548	0.777	1.063	1.486	1.894	2.546
0.180	0.340	0.548	0.777	1.063	1.486	1.894	2.546
0.148 	0.358 	0.633 	0.834 	1.053 	1.366 	1.606 	1.964
0.148 	0.358 	0.633 	0.834 	1.053 	1.366 	1.606 	1.964
0.148 	0.358 	0.633 	0.834 	1.053 	1.366 	1.606 	1.964
#selex AA
0.031	0.440	1.000	0.866	0.785	0.692	0.679	0.865
0.032	0.453	1.000	0.848	0.769	0.681	0.679	0.862
0.029	0.433	1.000	0.883	0.800	0.702	0.681	0.869
0.029	0.423	1.000	0.886	0.801	0.703	0.682	0.870
0.030	0.441	1.000	0.876	0.793	0.698	0.681	0.868
0.030	0.439	1.000	0.884	0.800	0.703	0.682	0.870
0.028	0.420	1.000	0.905	0.818	0.715	0.682	0.872
0.037	0.440	1.000	0.888	0.788	0.686	0.641	0.820
0.051	0.525	1.000	0.808	0.710	0.627	0.608	0.772
0.036	0.479	1.000	0.861	0.776	0.683	0.667	0.849
0.055	0.531	1.000	0.799	0.696	0.612	0.590	0.749
0.045	0.530	1.000	0.835	0.746	0.659	0.645	0.818
0.051	0.526	1.000	0.811	0.714	0.629	0.612	0.776
0.015	0.126	0.616	1.000	0.971	0.848	0.807	0.702
0.018	0.133	0.625	1.000	0.966	0.820	0.789	0.710
0.018	0.133	0.620	1.000	0.969	0.799	0.777	0.708
0.018	0.142	0.628	1.000	0.963	0.790	0.772	0.707
0.025	0.180	0.671	1.000	0.934	0.782	0.764	0.706
0.022	0.164	0.653	1.000	0.945	0.779	0.763	0.706
0.025	0.193	0.679	1.000	0.928	0.778	0.764	0.694
0.021	0.167	0.656	1.000	0.943	0.805	0.780	0.697
0.026	0.189	0.675	1.000	0.929	0.783	0.764	0.696
0.022	0.170	0.659	1.000	0.939	0.798	0.774	0.700
0.024	0.178	0.669	1.000	0.933	0.798	0.774	0.699
0.026	0.188	0.681	1.000	0.928	0.788	0.768	0.701
0.033	0.240	0.731	1.000	0.891	0.760	0.745	0.698
0.025	0.121	0.334	0.637	1.000	0.917	0.895	0.659
0.027	0.128	0.351	0.658	1.000	0.911	0.887	0.658
0.030	0.134	0.366	0.667	1.000	0.903	0.879	0.651
0.026	0.116	0.329	0.643	1.000	0.923	0.905	0.664
0.025	0.105	0.297	0.606	1.000	0.935	0.920	0.668
0.027	0.108	0.301	0.602	1.000	0.929	0.916	0.664
0.026	0.117	0.321	0.617	1.000	0.919	0.902	0.658
0.026	0.111	0.315	0.627	1.000	0.928	0.911	0.666
0.026	0.108	0.305	0.607	1.000	0.930	0.914	0.664
0.027	0.129	0.344	0.638	1.000	0.907	0.883	0.650
0.026	0.118	0.326	0.630	1.000	0.920	0.901	0.660
# proportion mature
0.26 0.78 0.97 1.00 1.00 1.00 1.00 1.00
# age at 50% selex in survey
0.5
# slope of survey selex
1.0
#SPR limit % (the overfishing limit)
0.35
# SPR target %
0.35
# Survey q 
0.005
# s.d. of q random walk
0.07 0.07
# ESS
200 50
# M_sigma
0.001
# Correlation in M
0.01 0.3
# relative bounds for M
0.5 1.5
# selex sigma
0.001
# selex correlation
0.01 0.3
# relative bounds for sf50
0.75 1.25
# Catch PSE
0.2
# Index PSE
0.3 0.5
# correlation in R 
0.0 0.44
# s.d. of recruitment deviations
#0.77 1.25
0.5 0.5
#sel_blocks
3
# sel_yrs
14 27
# sel obs
0.037	0.468	1.000	0.858	0.769	0.676	0.656	0.835
0.023	0.170	0.659	1.000	0.941	0.795	0.772	0.702
0.026	0.118	0.326	0.630	1.000	0.920	0.901	0.660
# Pstar buffers from 0.01 to 0.5, CV = 0.6, 1.0, 1.2
0.2752735
0.3201933
0.3524225
0.3787881
0.4016827
0.4222565
0.441161
0.4588048
0.475463
0.4913311
0.5065533
0.5212396
0.5354763
0.5493326
0.5628648
0.5761197
0.5891367
0.6019494
0.6145869
0.6270745
0.6394345
0.6516868
0.6638492
0.675938
0.6879677
0.6999521
0.7119036
0.723834
0.7357543
0.747675
0.7596059
0.7715567
0.7835365
0.7955543
0.8076187
0.8197384
0.8319217
0.844177
0.8565128
0.8689373
0.8814591
0.8940867
0.9068286
0.9196939
0.9326914
0.9458306
0.9591209
0.9725723
0.9861951
1.000000
0.230142
0.2733735
0.3049226
0.3310334
0.353913
0.3746288
0.3937878
0.4117723
0.4288407
0.4451769
0.4609172
0.4761658
0.4910047
0.5054997
0.5197047
0.5336647
0.5474177
0.5609961
0.5744281
0.5877386
0.6009493
0.6140799
0.6271482
0.6401703
0.653161
0.666134
0.6791022
0.6920778
0.705072
0.7180958
0.7311599
0.7442742
0.7574486
0.770693
0.7840167
0.7974293
0.81094
0.8245585
0.838294
0.8521562
0.8661547
0.8802994
0.8946005
0.9090682
0.9237133
0.9385467
0.95358
0.9688249
0.984294
1.000000
0.1441629
0.1808915
0.2089076
0.2328079
0.2542517
0.274053
0.2926796
0.3104294
0.3275051
0.3440523
0.3601799
0.375972
0.3914952
0.4068036
0.421942
0.4369483
0.4518547
0.4666894
0.4814771
0.49624
0.5109979
0.5257692
0.5405704
0.5554174
0.5703246
0.5853062
0.6003753
0.6155449
0.6308274
0.646235
0.6617797
0.6774735
0.6933282
0.7093558
0.7255681
0.7419774
0.7585959
0.7754363
0.7925114
0.8098346
0.8274194
0.84528
0.8634311
0.8818881
0.9006668
0.9197839
0.9392569
0.9591042
0.9793451
1.0

# End of file value
12345

```
